title: Apply a conditional formatting to multiple views
excerpt:
Hi! 
What about the possibility to apply a conditional formatting to multiple views without having to recreate it for each view? 
Could be a time saving feature during setup phase :wink: 
Best Regards

posts.author: ECH (Emmanuel CHERIGIE)
